summary: Added Attribution section with calibration curve, edge scatter, hit rate table, and trade class breakdown panels. Implemented /api/attribution/summary and /api/attribution/edge_scatter endpoints reading from trades_sports.db only.
data_source_verification: SELECT entry_model_prob, model_side_was_right, pnl_usd, trade_class FROM trades WHERE ts_close IS NOT NULL AND ts_close >= ? AND entry_model_prob IS NOT NULL AND model_side_was_right IS NOT NULL
SELECT expected_edge_pct, pnl_usd, trade_class FROM trades WHERE ts_close IS NOT NULL AND ts_close >= ? AND expected_edge_pct IS NOT NULL AND pnl_usd IS NOT NULL
notes: dashboard_v2.html is the authoritative dashboard file (newer version, 33KB vs 109KB original)
All four panels include sample size (n) with visual indicators for low-sample (<20) buckets
Low-sample buckets rendered muted (opacity:0.5) with tooltip 'Low sample — not statistically meaningful yet'
Calibration curve shows 45° diagonal reference line for perfect calibration
Edge scatter uses trade_class colors: MODEL_WIN_EXPECTED=#18d39e, MODEL_WIN_LUCKY=#5ab6ff, MODEL_LOSS_EXPECTED=#fbbf24, MODEL_LOSS_EXECUTION=#ff4d6d, UNRESOLVED=#91a2b6
Hit rate table includes mean P&L per confidence bucket
Trade class breakdown shows both count and net P&L per class
Attribution data fetched from /api/attribution/summary and /api/attribution/edge_scatter during poll() cycle (10s refresh)

implementation_details.calibration_buckets: 0.05 intervals from 0.50 to 1.00, computing predicted mean, realized win rate, mean P&L, and Brier contribution
implementation_details.overall_metrics: Brier score and log loss computed across all resolved trades
implementation_details.canvas_rendering: Edge scatter and calibration curve rendered with canvas API; calibration shows perfect-calibration 45° reference line
implementation_details.low_sample_handling: Buckets with n<20 marked with opacity:0.5, color:var(--dim), and title tooltip describing low sample size
